subtitles.original: Check check to the bridge!
subtitles.english: Check check to the bridge!

subtitles.original: 俺 悪くない 何も間違ってない
subtitles.english: I did nothing wrong, I made no mistake.

subtitles.original: 自分じゃない 何かのせいにしたい
subtitles.english: I'm not the one, I want to blame it on something else.

subtitles.original: 天才じゃないの だっせ分かんなさい
subtitles.english: I'm no genius, so understand my uncoolness.

subtitles.original: これ フィクションじゃない よく見なさい
subtitles.english: This is not fiction, take a good look.

subtitles.original: 天分の才などない でも...
subtitles.english: I have no natural talent, but...

subtitles.original: やめられない みたい
subtitles.english: I just can't seem to stop.

subtitles.original: あたしゃ阿呆か 馬鹿みたい
subtitles.english: Am I a fool? Like an idiot.

subtitles.original: 天才
subtitles.english: Genius!

subtitles.original: こっから
subtitles.english: From here!

subtitles.original: 燃える未来
subtitles.english: A burning future!

subtitles.original: メラメラ まだまだ
subtitles.english: Blazing hot, don't write yourself off yet!

subtitles.original: 自分で決めつけんな
subtitles.english: Find your limit, in your own world.

subtitles.original: 限界 探せよ お前ら
subtitles.english: Limit! Find it! Everyone's...

subtitles.original: 世界
subtitles.english: ...world!

subtitles.original: 本当の自分なんていやしねえよ
subtitles.english: There's no such thing as a "true self" anyway.

subtitles.original: 高くなきゃダメ 低くてもダメ
subtitles.english: It's no good high, it's no good low,

subtitles.original: と思い込んでることこそが
subtitles.english: assuming that itself is the problem.

subtitles.original: 好きこそものの上手なれ
subtitles.english: What one likes, one will do well.

subtitles.original: 次こそ吼える根比べ
subtitles.english: Next up is a contest of who barks louder.

subtitles.original: I can be so one way, so I know I know
subtitles.english: I can be so one way, so I know, I know.

subtitles.original: このブレーキを壊したいの したいの
subtitles.english: I want to break this brake, I really do.

subtitles.original: あ、四の五の言わずに動け
subtitles.english: Ah, stop making excuses and move.

subtitles.original: 道なき道ほど進め
subtitles.english: Advance further on the pathless road.

subtitles.original: どの叱咤も嫉妬なら燃料
subtitles.english: If any scolding is just jealousy, it's fuel.

subtitles.original: Let it fire!
subtitles.english: Let it fire!

subtitles.original: 燃やすこの闘志 その鉄格子 ぶち壊し
subtitles.english: Burn this fighting spirit, break down that iron grid.

subtitles.original: どうしようもないままが自分なんだ
subtitles.english: Being helpless is exactly who I am.

subtitles.original: こっから 始まんだ
subtitles.english: It starts from here!

subtitles.original: いつかの童心 持ってただろうし 夢と
subtitles.english: You probably still have that childhood heart, and your dream...

subtitles.original: 相思相愛になれるはずんだ
subtitles.english: ...and you are meant to be mutually in love.

subtitles.original: こっから
subtitles.english: From here...

subtitles.original: こっから始まんだ|こっから始まんだ
subtitles.english: ...it starts from right here!

subtitles.original: Yeah! 1234 順番通り
subtitles.english: Yeah! 1, 2, 3, 4, in order,

subtitles.original: いってないだけで予定通り
subtitles.english: just haven't said it, but all on schedule.

subtitles.original: rollin' rollin' 転がってけ
subtitles.english: Rollin' rollin', keep on rolling,

subtitles.original: よりどりみどりの一生
subtitles.english: a life full of endless choices.

subtitles.original: 1234 順番通り
subtitles.english: 1, 2, 3, 4, in order,

subtitles.original: いってないだけで予定通り
subtitles.english: just haven't said it, but all on schedule.

subtitles.original: rollin' rollin' 転がってけ
subtitles.english: Rollin' rollin', keep on rolling,

subtitles.original: こっから始まんだ
subtitles.english: it starts from here!

subtitles.original: 数年後\n- a few years later -
subtitles.english: A few years later

subtitles.original: Ha, ha, ha...
subtitles.english: Ha, ha, ha...

subtitles.original: I can't see what's behind those eyes
subtitles.english: I can't see what's behind those eyes.

subtitles.original: Just wait, talk a little before they're right
subtitles.english: Just wait, talk a little before they're right.

subtitles.original: 誰かの理想像に
subtitles.english: To someone else's ideal image,

subtitles.original: 耳を傾けてしまったの
subtitles.english: I ended up listening to it.

subtitles.original: I can't take it back no more
subtitles.english: I can't take it back no more.

subtitles.original: I guess it's too late to call it off
subtitles.english: I guess it's too late to call it off.

subtitles.original: 感情の無い世界に溺れてさ
subtitles.english: Drowning in a world with no emotions.

subtitles.original: Tell me who I'm supposed to be
subtitles.english: Tell me who I'm supposed to be.

subtitles.original: I'm lost without your honesty
subtitles.english: I'm lost without your honesty.

subtitles.original: I'm stuck between yes and no
subtitles.english: I'm stuck between yes and no.

subtitles.original: Don't let me down
subtitles.english: Don't let me down.

subtitles.original: This is what you came for
subtitles.english: This is what you came for.

subtitles.original: 狂ったように舞いな 舞いな
subtitles.english: Dance like you're going crazy, crazy!

subtitles.original: Said you wanna be a Superstar
subtitles.english: Said you wanna be a Superstar.

subtitles.original: Show me you won't break and fall apart
subtitles.english: Show me you won't break and fall apart.

subtitles.original: Take me higher, higher!
subtitles.english: Take me higher, higher!

subtitles.original: Show me you won't break and fall apart
subtitles.english: Show me you won't break and fall apart.

responses.thoughts:
**The Subtitle Architect's Musings**

Okay, here's how I'm thinking about this. The mission is clear: produce killer, synced subtitles in JSON. Timecodes, audio-first, precise to the millisecond. No overlaps, and aggressively truncated end times. I am on the lookout for visual events that need timing. I'm building this from scratch, but it is driven by the audio. No CC tags! I'm going for that MM:SS.mmm format.

First, I scope the entire video. Starts at 00:00, looks like about 5:05 total length. I am making it clear where this video is beginning and ending, and how it is laid out. I have marked up the segments of the video: Performers dancing to "Kokkara," the visual cue of "数年後," and then the "Superstar" song, which is my second major track.

Now, into the weeds with "Kokkara." I am making sure the translation is slick, while being accurate. Let's make sure the audio is perfect at the start, making sure that it is at the correct time (00:12.700), "Check check to the bridge!" From here, I am making sure the lyrics align with the actual audio of the song. I make sure to do a deep listen to this song, from the vocals. The reference lyrics and the actual audio are slightly different - I have to make the call as to whether the audio, or the reference lyrics, get priority. It's a close call, but I will go with the audio! I'm nailing down every line, with timestamps, right until the outro laughs, and make sure that it sounds right.

I then tackle that visual event - "数年後 - a few years later -". It's a key transition, so I will capture it accurately from 01:46.000 to 02:02.000. It's important to keep that text on screen until the next visual event begins.

Now, "Superstar" comes into play. I am picking up the audio here at 02:06.500. It's a new song, so I need to go through it, line by line, while listening closely to the audio. I am finding and using every timestamp for every line. I will be doing this song until it reaches the end of the video. I am really going through the entire song and making sure I capture every spoken line.

After I get all the timings, I double-check them. Every time. I'll listen to the audio again, line by line. I will make minor adjustments where necessary. I am going to make sure that the whole video's timings are perfect. I make sure I am listening to the complete song and the video. I want to build out those precise timestamps and make sure they are flawless.

Finally, I'm going to assemble everything in a clean JSON structure, no unnecessary CC tags, and output it using `final_result`. I am going to make sure that it is a great subtitle file, on time, and on point.
